emails.subject: RMT
emails.body: Susan, Confirm for me that you want financial deals only......or not. Thanks. To: Anderson, Diane

emails.subject: RE: RMT
emails.body: RE: RMT Diane, My request was for the financial deals. But if you have access to the physical RMT/Intercompany I would like those too. Susan To: Bailey, Susan

emails.subject: RE: RMT
emails.body: I don't. Well, to be accurate, some physical might show up, but not the majority. Those you'd have to get through Ellen. To: Anderson, Diane

emails.subject: RE: RMT
emails.body: Susan, I don't remember if I sent this to you already so here's the spreadsheet....there are almost 9,000 RMT deals. Do you need these confirms too? Please say no. Diane To: Anderson, Diane
